(a) What is the electric potential at the electron’s orbit due to the proton? (b) What is the kinetic energy of the electron? (c) What is the total energy of the electron in its orbit? (d) What is the ionization energy- that is, the energy required to remove the electron from the at rest? Express the results of atom and take it to parts (b), (c), and (d) in joules and eV. r = q, *17-6 Electric Dipoles
final_answer: (a) 27 V; (b) or 14 eV; (c) or (d) or 14 eV.
